dtsPropsFor.Spinner:
/** Text shown beside the spinner. @default 'Loading…' */
  label?: string;
dtsPropsFor.ErrorBanner:
/** Message to show. Renders nothing when empty. */
  message?: string;
dtsPropsFor.CanvasBadge:
/** Back-compat alias for <LmsBadge source="canvas" />. */
  className?: string;
